title: podman hosed after windows upgrade
body: ### Issue Description After windows upgrade podman no longer works ### Steps to reproduce the issue Steps to reproduce the issue 1. upgraded from Windows 10 to windows 11 22H2 2. uninstalled podman and resintalled it 3. version podman-4.5.1 ### Describe the results you received Describe the results you received ### Describe the results you expected Just keeps spinning during the install ### podman info output ```yaml 4.5.1 ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details _No response_ ### Additional information _No response_

comments.body:
uninstalled and reinstalled following and back to binez
* wsl
* podman
* podman desktop
